title: Modena, Emilia-Romagna — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Modena, Emilia-Romagna: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Modena is a city in Emilia-Romagna with a population of 187,000. The heart of Italy’s motor valley, home to Ferrari, Lamborghini, and Maserati, plus the world’s best balsamic vinegar and tortellini.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
